name: herdr-pr-loop
description: Herdr multi-agent loop orchestration for local tasks and PR review.

interface.shortDescription: Launch tester, coder, and reviewer loops in Herdr.
interface.longDescription: A portable skill and uv tool for setting up Herdr-managed multi-agent loops with local state, review queues, run logs, safety gates, and optional remote PR sync.
defaultPrompt: Set up a local Herdr loop for this repo.
Initialize Herdr loop state and config.
